repo.description: Adan: Adaptive Nesterov Momentum Algorithm for Faster Optimizing Deep Models

terms.context_snippet: This is an official PyTorch implementation of **Adan**. See the paper [here](https://arxiv.org/abs/2208.06677). If you find our adan helpful or heuristic to your projects, please cite this paper and also star this repository. Thanks!
